rootCause: The native catalog bundled the truncated episode-card summary instead of the complete show notes already present in each local episode page.
fixes: Hydrate all descriptions from www/episodes/<id>/index.html before tests and Capacitor sync
Keep card summary and full Episode Detail description as separate fields
Merge bundled full descriptions into cached and remote catalogs using the longest-text rule
Advance content, migration, and formatter cache versions
Convert emoji-led show-note lines into Also on the Table topic cards
Remove the unsupported footer emoji box
